About Us

Built on relationships, not appointments

MBS Medical was founded on a simple idea: healthcare works better when your provider actually knows you. One consistent provider, comprehensive records, and a care plan that evolves with your life.

Continuity of care

You see the same provider every time. They know your history, your medications, and your goals — not just what's in the chart.

Evolving care plans

Your care plan isn't static. It grows and adapts as your health changes, your goals shift, and new information comes in.

The Team

Who's behind your care

David, PA-C

Physician Associate · Founder

  • • 12 years U.S. Army service
  • • PA-C, Licensed in Florida
  • • Primary care, weight loss, TRT evaluation

Founded MBS Medical to provide direct, consistent access to a provider who knows each patient's full health picture.

Dr. Eric Folkens, MD

Supervising Physician

  • • American Board of Family Medicine certified
  • • 34+ years clinical practice
  • • Family medicine and primary care

Dr. Mark Dawson, MD

Supervising Physician

  • • 30+ years clinical practice
  • • Gastroenterology and metabolic health
  • • Oversight for GI health and complex cases

Ready to meet your provider?

Book a visit and start building a care relationship that lasts.

Book a Visit

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance needed. Same-week appointments with a provider who knows you.
